$comment: Spec pin for the regression baseline. The pipeline-snapshot.json was captured against the upstream spec content fingerprinted by `expectedSpecHash`. CI fetches the spec at `specRef` and aborts early if its hash drifts, so reviewers see a clear 'spec changed upstream — re-pin' signal instead of an opaque snapshot diff. To bump: fetch a newer spec, run `npm run snapshot:update`, then update both fields below in the same PR.
